events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: spring can travel pins not pulled after hydro. In piping supports, spring hangers have travel pins (locking pins) that hold spring in neutral position during installation/hydrotest to prevent overtravel; after hydro, pins must be removed to allow spring to function. Not pulling pins after hydro means support is locked, cannot absorb thermal movement/pipe weight changes, leading to excessive load on piping/equipment, potential failure. Non-compliant, installed-defective. Work stage rough-complete. Decision fail. Risk high? Could cause pipe support failure, stress, maybe critical if high energy piping. Industrial site heavy process. Risk high or critical. Let's assess. Spring hanger locked after hydro: support inoperative; pipe thermal expansion constrained; load redistribution; potential catastrophic failure in high pressure/temp. But immediate hazard maybe not imminent. Risk high. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85? Rough-complete. Value irrelevant 0. Sound etc default. Findings: spring hanger travel pins remain installed after hydrotest, preventing support operation. Actions: remove travel pins, verify cold load/hot load settings, inspect support function, document. Rationale. References: MSS SP-58, project support standards, manufacturer instructions. Need JSON exact shape. Ensure no prose outside.

events.label: response

  "findings": ["Spring hanger travel pins were not removed after hydrotesting, leaving the support locked and unable to function."],
  "actions": ["Remove all spring hanger travel pins/locking pins that were left in place after hydrotest.", "Verify cold-load and hot-load settings per manufacturer and project support standards.", "Inspect each spring hanger for free movement and correct load indication.", "Document completion and re-inspect before close-out."],
  "rationale": "Spring hangers must be free to operate after hydrotest. Leaving travel pins installed defeats the support, imposes unintended restraint and load redistribution on the piping system, and violates project support standards and MSS SP-58 support installation requirements.",
  "references": ["MSS SP-58", "project support standards", "manufacturer spring hanger installation instructions"]
}
